## Checklist

- [ ] The three-level quality gate is green locally (backend build/vet/test, frontend build/e2e, `go run ./cmd/gapreport`)
- [ ] `docs/contracts/gap-report.md` is updated (re-run `go run ./cmd/gapreport`) if the API surface changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, CONTRIBUTING, or `docs/`) if behavior or setup changed
